title: gazar #1504
definition:
1) to cut, divide, cut down, cut off, cut in two, snatch, decree
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to cut in two, divide
        1a2) to cut down
        1a3) to cut off, destroy, exterminate
        1a4) to decree
    1b) (Niphal)
        1b1) to be cut off, separated, excluded
        1b2) to be destroyed,  cut off
        1b3) to be decreed
nasbUsage:

    NASB:  to cut, divide
